metadata.description: Foundation for the SnapHanoi admin experience, built for a premium visual service workflow.

shell.title: Built for a premium photography operation, not a generic back office.
shell.description: The public auth surface carries the same calm visual discipline as the admin area: editorial tone, direct hierarchy, and clean access flows.
shell.card2: Quiet session recovery when the workspace is still valid

auth.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

login.title: Sign into the studio console.
login.description: Sign in to manage clients, team access, and the studio workflow from one calm control room.
login.passwordChangedDescription: Please sign in again with your new password.

forgotPassword.title: Request a fresh password link.
forgotPassword.description: If the email belongs to an account, we will send a reset link without revealing any account details on this screen.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If the account exists, a reset link has been sent.

register.title: Request studio access.
register.description: We will create a pending registration request and send a confirmation link to your email before the account becomes active.
register.footer: Registration does not create a usable account immediately.
register.successDescription: Check your email for the confirmation link.

errors.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

registerConfirm.title: Finish account activation.
registerConfirm.description: If you opened this page from the email link, the confirmation token is already attached and ready to use.
registerConfirm.linkDetected: Confirmation link detected. Continue below, or enter a different token manually.
registerConfirm.useLinkToken: Use the token from the email link
registerConfirm.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new account.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password.
resetPassword.description: If you opened this page from the email link, the reset token is already attached. After success, you will sign in again with the new password.
resetPassword.linkDetected: Reset link detected. Continue below, or switch to manual token entry if needed.
resetPassword.useLinkToken: Use the token from the email link
resetPassword.successDescription: Please sign in again with your new password.

errors.newPasswordWeak: New password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
